name: PulseDesk - Solo Builder Operations Platform
acceptance_criteria: User can register, login, and logout and access only their own data
User can create, list, update, and delete tasks with status and due date
User can create, list, update, and delete incident records with severity and resolution notes
Dashboard displays open tasks count, incidents by severity, and weekly completion trend
Weekly digest export returns markdown summary with completed tasks, open risks, and incident recap
goal: Help solo builders reduce operational blind spots and close weekly priorities with confidence

constraints.testing: Unit and integration tests for core workflows

in_scope: Task CRUD with status and due date
Incident logging with severity and resolution notes
